sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) a word of the later Hebrew, for the older חָצֵר a court (of the temple), 2Ch 4:9 6:13 from עָזַר in the signification of surrounding, i.q. עָצַר, חָצַר. (Often in the Targ.; Arab. عَرْصَةُ id.).

(2) a ledge (of the altar), Abfatz, Terrasse, Eze 43:14, 17 Eze 43:17, 20 Eze 43:20.
